questions.question: What is Jesse Pollak's primary goal for moving Farcaster validators to different continents in May 2026?
options: To pave the way for others to run validators from different geos
To improve the speed of the cricket stream
questions.explanation: Jesse stated that moving a mainnet validator to another continent helps pave the way to onboard others to run validators from different geographic locations.
